Superior Sigil of Absorption
upgrades.description: Steal 3 boons when interrupting a foe. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 10 seconds) (Cooldown against defiant foes: 3 seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Accuracy
upgrades.description: +7% Critical Chance

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Agility
upgrades.description: Gain 5 seconds of swiftness and 1 second of quickness when swapping to this weapon in combat. (Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Agony
upgrades.description: Increase Inflicted Bleeding Duration: 20%

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Air
upgrades.description:
Unleash a lightning strike upon critically hitting a foe.
(Cooldown: 3 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Battle
upgrades.description: Gain 5 stacks of might for 12 seconds when swapping to this weapon in combat. (Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Benevolence
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge that grants a 0.5% increase in healing to other allies each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Blight
upgrades.description:
Inflict nearby enemies with 2 stacks of poison for 4 seconds upon landing a critical hit.
(Cooldown: 8 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Blood
upgrades.description:
Steal a foe's health upon landing a critical hit.
(Cooldown: 5 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Bloodlust
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge of +10 power each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Bounty
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge of +9 concentration each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Bursting
upgrades.description: +5% Condition Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Concentration

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Corruption

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Cruelty

Gain a charge of +10 ferocity each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Debility

+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Destroyer Slaying

+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Doom

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Draining
upgrades.description: Steal life when interrupting an enemy. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown against defiant foes: 3 seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Dreams
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Nightmare Court
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Earth

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Elemental Slaying

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Energy

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Fire
upgrades.description:
Trigger a flame blast with a 240 radius upon critically hitting a foe.
(Cooldown: 5 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Force
upgrades.description: +5% Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Frailty
upgrades.description: Inflict 2 stacks of vulnerability for 8 seconds after striking a foe from behind or the flank or when they are defiant. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 2 seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Frenzy
upgrades.description: Recharge all equipped skills by 2 seconds upon killing an enemy. <c=@reminder>Cooldown: 10 seconds</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Generosity
upgrades.description:
Transfer a condition upon critically hitting a foe.
(Cooldown: 6 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Geomancy
upgrades.description:
Inflict nearby foes with bleeding for 8 seconds after swapping to this weapon in combat.
(Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Ghost Slaying
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Ghosts
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Grawl Slaying

+7% Strike Damage vs. Grawl
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Hobbling

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Hologram Slaying
upgrades.description:
+17% Strike Damage vs. Dragon Bash Holograms
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Hydromancy
upgrades.description:
Damage nearby foes and chill them for 2 seconds when you swap to this weapon while in combat.
(Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Ice
upgrades.description: Chill a foe for 2 seconds after striking from its flank or when they are defiant. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 10 seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Icebrood Slaying
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Icebrood
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Impact
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Stunned or Knocked-Down Foes
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Incapacitation
upgrades.description: Cripple a foe for 2 seconds after striking from its flank or when they are defiant. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 5 seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Justice
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Outlaws
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Karka Slaying
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Karka
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Leeching
upgrades.description: Your next attack after swapping to this weapon while in combat steals some health. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 9 Seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Life
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge of +10 healing each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Luck
upgrades.description: 75% chance to gain a random boon on killing an enemy.

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Mad Scientists
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Inquest
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Malice
upgrades.description: +10% condition duration.

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Mischief
upgrades.description:
Launch up to 4 blinding snowballs at foes in front of you when you swap to this weapon in combat.
(Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Momentum
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge of +5 toughness each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Nullification
upgrades.description:
Remove a boon from a foe after striking from its flank or when they are defiant.
(Cooldown: 5 seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Ogre Slaying
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Ogres
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Paralyzation
upgrades.description: +30% Stun Duration

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Perception

Gain a charge of +10 precision each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Peril
upgrades.description: Increase Inflicted Vulnerability Duration: 20%

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Purity
upgrades.description:
Remove a condition after striking a foe from its flank or when they are defiant.
(Cooldown: 4 seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Rage
upgrades.description:
Gain quickness for 3 seconds upon critically hitting a foe.
(Cooldown: 20 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Rending
upgrades.description: Inflict 5 stacks of vulnerability for 10 seconds when interrupting a foe. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 3 Seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Renewal
upgrades.description:
Heal Nearby Allies on Weapon Swap (360 Radius)
(Cooldown: 9 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Restoration
upgrades.description: Gain health when interrupting a foe. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 5 Seconds)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Ruthlessness

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Serpent Slaying
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Krait

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Severance
upgrades.description: Upon interrupting an enemy, gain up to 250 precision and ferocity for 4 seconds, depending on level. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 1 second)</c>

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Smoldering
upgrades.description: Increase Inflicted Burning Duration: 20%

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Smothering
upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Flame Legion
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Dredge
+3% Strike Damage

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Speed
upgrades.description: Gain Swiftness (20 Seconds) on Killing a Foe

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Stamina
upgrades.description: Your endurance is refilled each time you kill a foe.

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Strength
upgrades.description:
Gain might for 10 seconds upon critically hitting a foe.
(Cooldown: 1 Second)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of the Night
upgrades.description: Outgoing damage is increased by 3% with an additional 7% at night.

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of the Stars
upgrades.description:
Gain a charge of +2 to all stats each time you kill a foe, five charges if you kill an enemy player. (Max 25 stacks; ends on down.)
(Only one attribute-stacking sigil can be active at a time.)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Torment
upgrades.description:
Inflict 2 stacks of torment for 5 seconds to enemies around your target upon landing a critical hit.
(Cooldown: 5 Seconds)

upgrades.name: Superior Sigil of Transference

upgrades.description:
+7% Strike Damage vs. Undead
+3% Strike Damage

(Cooldown: 5 Seconds)

relics.name: Legendary Relic
relics.description: Unused Relic Effect Slot

relics.name: Relic of Agony
relics.description:
Enemies you interrupt are inflicted with Agony of the Choir.
This trait can only affect enemies with defiance bars once per interval.

relics.name: Relic of Akeem
relics.description: When you disable an enemy that is afflicted by 5 or more stacks of confusion or torment, inflict confusion and torment on enemies around the target.

relics.name: Relic of Altruism
relics.description: Grant might and fury to nearby allies after using a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of Antitoxin
relics.description: Outgoing condition cleanses remove an additional condition. <c=@reminder>This can only affect an ally once every 10 seconds.</c>

relics.name: Relic of Atrocity
relics.description: Your lifesteal damage and healing is increased.

relics.name: Relic of Bava Nisos
relics.description: Upon using a <c=@abilitytype>stance</c> skill, cleanse conditions from yourself.

relics.name: Relic of Bloodstone
relics.description: Gain Bloodstone Volatility when you successfully combo a field with a blast finisher. Blasting at the stack threshold triggers an explosion, granting increased damage.

relics.name: Relic of Castora
relics.description: Healing to other allies is increased while they are below the health threshold.

relics.name: Relic of Cerus
relics.description: Upon using an elite skill, summon an Eye of Cerus that emits a rotating line attack, dealing damage and converting boons into conditions.

relics.name: Relic of Dagda
relics.description: After using an elite skill, fire a projectile at the target or nearest enemy that damages and inflicts conditions. Damage scales with the recharge of the elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of Durability
relics.description: Gain protection and regeneration after using a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of Dwayna
relics.description: Regeneration you apply is more effective.

relics.name: Relic of Evasion
relics.description: Gain vigor after evading an attack.

relics.name: Relic of Febe
relics.description: When you use a healing skill, grant nearby allies swiftness and remove movement-impairing conditions from them.

relics.name: Relic of Fire
relics.description: Gain fire aura after using a healing skill. Fire aura now increases your outgoing strike damage.

relics.name: Relic of Fireworks
relics.description: Upon dealing strike damage using a weapon skill with a recharge time of 20 seconds or more, deal increased strike damage for a duration. Refreshes duration on stack.

relics.name: Relic of Fog
relics.description: After dodge rolling in combat, the next incoming strike will always be a glancing blow.

relics.name: Relic of Geysers
relics.description: Restore endurance to allies when you grant them vigor.

relics.name: Relic of Isgarren
relics.description: After evading an enemy's attack, place the Eye of Isgarren on them for a duration. You deal increased strike and condition duration against enemies with the Eye of Isgarren.

relics.name: Relic of Karakosa
relics.description: Heal other nearby allies when you successfully combo a field with a blast finisher.

relics.name: Relic of Leadership
relics.description: Convert conditions into boons on nearby allies after using an elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of Lyhr
relics.description: Upon healing an ally, shield up to four allies, redirecting a percentage of any strike damage they take to yourself. Allies may only be protected by one shield at a time.

relics.name: Relic of Mabon
relics.description: Upon applying might while in combat, gain Mabon's Strength. At 10 stacks, your might stacks become more effective for a duration, after which you lose all might and Mabon's Strength.

relics.name: Relic of Mercy
relics.description: Revive allies faster and with more health. Only affects players in WvW.

relics.name: Relic of Mistburn
relics.description: When you grant might to yourself, grant yourself additional might. Gain increased critical-strike chance while at or above the might threshold.

relics.name: Relic of Mosyn
relics.description: Remove a nondamaging condition whenever you evade an attack.

relics.name: Relic of Mount Balrior
relics.description: After using an elite skill, create an area underneath yourself. Standing in this area increases your outgoing strike damage.

relics.name: Relic of Nayos
relics.description: Removing a condition from yourself heals you.

relics.name: Relic of Nourys
relics.description: Gain stacks of Nourys's Hunger every interval when you remove boons from enemies. Consume 10 stacks to grow larger, dealing increased damage, taking reduced damage, and converting a percentage of outgoing damage into healing.

relics.name: Relic of Peitha
relics.description: After shadowstepping or using a deception skill, fire a blade at a nearby enemy after a short delay, applying torment and increasing your strike damage against that target.

relics.name: Relic of Resistance
relics.description: Gain resistance after using a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of Reunification
relics.description: Gain frost aura and light aura after using a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of Rivers
relics.description: Gain alacrity and regeneration at the end of your dodge roll.

relics.name: Relic of Shackles
relics.description: Tether yourself to enemies when you immobilize them. Deal damage to enemies that are still in range of the tether when it expires. <c=@reminder>Each enemy can only be tethered once per interval.</c>

relics.name: Relic of Sorrow
relics.description: After using an elite skill, create an area that protects allies and destroys enemy projectiles.

relics.name: Relic of Speed
relics.description: Increase movement speed when under the effect of swiftness.

relics.name: Relic of Surging
relics.description: Gain shocking aura for 4 seconds after using an elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Adventurer
relics.description: Gain 50% endurance after using a healing skill. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 20 Seconds)</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Afflicted
relics.description: Create a Death Nova at a foe's location upon their defeat that inflicts poison and bleeding. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 10 Seconds)</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Alliance
relics.description: Using a signet skill reduces the recharge of all signet skills.

relics.name: Relic of the Aristocracy
relics.description: Gain 3% condition duration for 8 seconds when inflicting weakness or vulnerability on a foe, up to a maximum of 5 stacks. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 1 Second)</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Astral Ward
relics.description: Gain a Signet of the Astral Ward after using a signet skill. Using a signet skill while this signet is active consumes it to remove conditions from nearby allies and grant them resistance.

relics.name: Relic of the Beehive
relics.description: After using an elite skill, release a wave of pheromones that causes bees to swarm enemies struck.

relics.name: Relic of the Biomancer
relics.description: Heal yourself when you inflict bleeding or poison on a foe.

relics.name: Relic of the Blightbringer
relics.description: Gain stacks of Greer's Virulence when you inflict poison on a foe. After reaching the maximum number of stacks, the next time you inflict poison also inflicts additional conditions on nearby enemies.

relics.name: Relic of the Brawler
relics.description: Deal increased strike damage for a duration when granting protection or resolution to yourself.

relics.name: Relic of the Cavalier
relics.description: Grant yourself aegis, quickness, swiftness, resistance, and might when striking an enemy with your mount's <c=@abilitytype>engage</c> skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Centaur
relics.description: Gain stability when you use a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Chronomancer
relics.description: Gain quickness when you use a <c=@abilitytype>well</c> skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Citadel
relics.description: After using an elite skill, call down an artillery strike that inflicts stun on the skill target or nearest enemy.

relics.name: Relic of the Claw
relics.description: Deal increased strike damage for a duration after you disable a foe.

relics.name: Relic of the Coral Heart
relics.description: After using a healing skill, temporarily deal damage to nearby enemies when struck.

relics.name: Relic of the Daredevil
relics.description: After dodge rolling in combat or evading an attack, your next attack is guaranteed to be a critical hit. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 1 Second)</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Deadeye
relics.description: Deal increased strike damage for a duration when you use a <c=@abilitytype>cantrip</c> skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Defender
relics.description: Heal a percentage of your maximum health after blocking an attack. If you block again within 5 seconds, you heal less each time down to a minimum of 1%.

relics.name: Relic of the Demon Queen
relics.description:
Poison that you apply reduces healing by an additional amount. Disabling a foe applies poison.
Disables include stun, taunt, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, fear, and launch.

relics.name: Relic of the Dragonhunter
relics.description: Enemies hit by your trap skills become hunted by you, increasing your strike damage and condition duration against them.

relics.name: Relic of the Eagle
relics.description: Deal increased strike damage to low-health enemies.

relics.name: Relic of the Earth
relics.description: Grant protection and magnetic aura to allies after using an elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Firebrand
relics.description: Upon using the final charge of a mantra skill, gain increased boon duration.

relics.name: Relic of the First Revenant
relics.description: Gain incoming condition damage reduction while you have resistance.

relics.name: Relic of the Flock
relics.description: Grant barrier to yourself and nearby allies after you use a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Forest Dweller
relics.description: After using an elite skill, launch bubbles at nearby enemies. Enemies struck by the bubbles become trapped and float for a short period of time.

relics.name: Relic of the Founding
relics.description: Gain barrier when you successfully combo a field with a leap finisher.

relics.name: Relic of the Fractal
relics.description: When you inflict bleeding on an enemy with 6 or more stacks of bleeding, also inflict burning and torment.

relics.name: Relic of the Golemancer
relics.description: Summon a golem while in combat.

relics.name: Relic of the Herald
relics.description: Gain concentration after granting a boon to an ally.

relics.name: Relic of the Holosmith
relics.description: Create a laser disk after you use an elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Ice
relics.description: After using an elite skill, launch icicles that inflict chilled at nearby enemies.

relics.name: Relic of the Krait
relics.description: After using an elite skill, emit a wave of corruption that inflicts damaging conditions.

relics.name: Relic of the Lich
relics.description: Summon a jagged horror while in combat.

relics.name: Relic of the Living City
relics.description:
Complete each trigger once to gain stacks of Titanic Potential:
• Use a healing skill
• Use an elite skill
• Finish a combo field
• Disable an enemy
• Evade an attack
At 5 stacks, gain Soul of the Titan, providing increased attributes and all boons for its duration.

relics.name: Relic of the Midnight King
relics.description:
Grant might and fury to nearby allies when you disable an enemy.
Disables include stun, taunt, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, fear, and launch.

relics.name: Relic of the Mirage
relics.description: Inflict torment upon successfully evading an attack.

relics.name: Relic of the Mist Stranger
relics.description: Siphon health whenever you hit a foe.

relics.name: Relic of the Mists Tide
relics.description: Cleanse a condition from yourself when you successfully combo a field with a leap or blast finisher.

relics.name: Relic of the Monk
relics.description: Increase healing effectiveness to allies after granting a boon to an ally.

relics.name: Relic of the Nautical Beast
relics.description: Create a tidal wave that damages enemies and heals allies when you successfully combo a water field with a leap finisher.

relics.name: Relic of the Necromancer
relics.description: Fear you inflict causes foes to move slower.

relics.name: Relic of the Nightmare
relics.description: After using an elite skill, send forth a nightmare pulse that inflicts fear and poison on nearby enemies.

relics.name: Relic of the Ogre
relics.description: Summon a rock dog while in combat.

relics.name: Relic of the Pack
relics.description: Grant superspeed to nearby allies after using an elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Phenom
relics.description: Upon using a <c=@abilitytype>cantrip</c> or <c=@abilitytype>meditation</c> skill, gain protection.

relics.name: Relic of the Pirate Queen
relics.description: Gain quickness when you disable a foe.

relics.name: Relic of the Privateer
relics.description: Summon a parrot while in combat.

relics.name: Relic of the Reaper
relics.description: Chill nearby enemies after executing a <c=@abilitytype>shout</c> skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Scoundrel
relics.description: Gain increased critical-hit chance for a duration after inflicting blindness or weakness.

relics.name: Relic of the Scourge
relics.description: Upon applying barrier to an ally, gain increased condition duration. <c=@reminder>When this triggers, refresh the duration of all stacks.</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Sorcerer
relics.description: When you inflict crippled, chilled, or immobile, you also inflict vulnerability.

relics.name: Relic of the Steamshrieker
relics.description: Burn nearby enemies when you successfully combo a water field with a blast or leap finisher.

relics.name: Relic of the Stormsinger
relics.description: After using a movement skill, your next attack creates an arc of chain lightning that strikes nearby enemies.

relics.name: Relic of the Sunless
relics.description: Using an elite skill summons a pool on the target enemy that inflicts poison and cripple. Pool duration scales with the recharge of the elite skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Thief
relics.description: Upon striking an enemy with a weapon skill that has a recharge or resource cost, gain increased strike damage. <c=@reminder>When this triggers, refresh the duration of all stacks.</c>

relics.name: Relic of the Trooper
relics.description: Remove a condition from affected allies after using a <c=@abilitytype>shout</c> skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Twin Generals
relics.description: Gain might and weaken nearby enemies when you use a healing skill. Gain additional might for each enemy struck.

relics.name: Relic of the Unseen Invasion
relics.description: Grant yourself and nearby allies superspeed when you enter or exit stealth.

relics.name: Relic of the Warrior
relics.description: Weapon swap recharge time is reduced.

relics.name: Relic of the Water
relics.description: Cleanse conditions from yourself and nearby allies after using a healing skill.

relics.name: Relic of the Wayfinder
relics.description: Gain increased movement speed, which is further increased while out of combat. When you enter combat, gain a burst of speed.

relics.name: Relic of the Weaver
relics.description: Upon using a <c=@abilitytype>stance</c> skill, deal increased strike damage for a duration.

relics.name: Relic of the Wizard's Tower
relics.description: After using an elite skill, shield yourself with a projectile-reflecting barrier while summoning a wave that pulls enemies toward you.

relics.name: Relic of the Zephyrite
relics.description: Summon crystals that apply protection and resolution to allies after using an elite skill. Crystal duration scales with the recharge of the used skill.

relics.name: Relic of Thorns
relics.description: Gain stacking condition damage when you are hit by a poisoned foe. <c=@reminder>When this triggers, it refreshes the duration of all stacks.</c>

relics.name: Relic of Vampirism
relics.description: Siphon life from nearby foes when you use a healing skill. Restore a portion of your maximum health upon killing a foe.

relics.name: Relic of Vass
relics.description: After using a healing or elixir skill, your next few attacks inflict poison. <c=@reminder>Healing skills can only trigger this effect once every interval.</c>

relics.name: Relic of Zakiros
relics.description: While you are under the effects of fury, convert a percentage of your outgoing critical-strike damage into healing.
